input.background: A parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability. The system reliability is calculated using the formula $$R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999$$.
input.question: What is the failure time of the parallel system when the ith component has failure time $T_i$?

output.answer: The parallel system will fail only upon failure of all its components, and the system failure time is $$T_P=\max _{1 \leq i \leq n} T_i$$.
